title: T8 Doc truth: Switchboard greenfield charter recon
prompt: Truth recon, read-only outside two doc pins: answer two disputed facts with disk/network evidence, never doc claims. (1) Was the Switchboard greenfield charter ever authored? The three 2026-06-09 INPUTS exist (backlog/2026-06-09-switchboard-greenfield-{KICKOFF,seed}.md + ...charter-grounding.md, whose own header says it is the INPUT to /agent-skills:spec, not the charter) — verify no charter OUTPUT exists in docs/, ../switchboard/, or ~/dev/ad/brains/dark-factory/. (2) Is Switchboard actually running, and where? Authoring 2026-07-06 found it DOWN on mac-mini-m4 (no :5099/:5100 listener, no launchd job) but UP on Roamy (launchd com.appydave.switchboard, both /health endpoints ok via ssh) — and host-local-bound (src/main.ts ~45), so remote curl timeouts are NOT evidence of down; probe only via ssh <host> 'curl http://localhost:5099/health'. Ship docs/switchboard-charter-recon.md (verdicts, charter paper trail, per-machine liveness matrix with verbatim probe output, probe protocol, code state incl. no state-plane recipes on either machine, contradiction ledger over comms-flow.md:39 / auto-wake.md:131 / dark-factory-constellation.md:64 / problems.md:39, and an explicit what-this-means-for-T1-11 section routing its forks F1/F2). Place exactly two pins: a dated STATUS banner on the KICKOFF file and one docs/INDEX.md line. Never start/stop/install/edit Switchboard on any machine; both Switchboard repos are read-only; ssh commands read-only. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T8-09-switchboard-charter-recon.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: In ~/dev/ad/apps/dark-factory: docs/switchboard-charter-recon.md exists with >=7 '## ' sections, both headline verdicts date-stamped, a per-machine liveness matrix quoting verbatim probe commands+outputs, the ssh-localhost probe protocol (grep 'localhost:5099' hits), a >=4-row contradiction ledger, and a T1-11 handoff section (grep 'T1-11' hits). `grep -n switchboard-charter-recon docs/INDEX.md backlog/2026-06-09-switchboard-greenfield-KICKOFF.md` returns exactly two hits. A wg-t8-09 self-report exists in engine/store/results/ and the commit is pushed. Negative: `git -C ../switchboard status --porcelain` empty; local `launchctl list | grep -i switchboard` unchanged from the report's own Move-2 result; the commit touches only the report, the two pinned files, and results/; `grep -n 'live on MacBook Pro' docs/comms-flow.md` still hits (ledger catalogued, not fixed); engine/store/needs-decision/ has a wg-t8-09 entry only if an abort fired.
